"
CSV -> D1 import script.

Reads products_template.csv (or any CSV in that format) and generates a
.sql file of INSERT statements to run against your D1 database via:

    wrangler d1 execute custom-shop-db --remote --file=import_output.sql

This script does NOT hit the network -- it only generates SQL locally,
so you can review the output before running it against the real database.

Usage:
    python3 import_products.py products.csv import_output.sql
"
